## Weekly Sprint Overview

This week focuses on delivering the core functionality for the new app feature. The team will divide their time between sprint planning, daily development sprints, quality assurance testing, and end-of-day standups.

## Day 1 and 2: Core Coding

On Monday and Tuesday, the team prioritizes implementation. Developers spend eight hours each day writing backend APIs and frontend components. Code reviews are conducted immediately after completion of modules during late afternoon sessions.

## Day 3 and 4: Integration and Testing

Wednesday and Thursday shift towards testing phases. Automated unit tests are run in parallel with integration testing. Quality Assurance engineers validate the entire workflow while developers debug critical issues reported by the QA team.

## Day 5: Final Polish and Meeting

Friday is dedicated to performance optimization and bug fixing. All team members participate in a retrospective meeting to discuss lessons learned and finalize tasks for next week.<|im_end|>

final_answer:
## Weekly Sprint Overview

This week focuses on delivering the core functionality for the new app feature. The team will divide their time between sprint planning, daily development sprints, quality assurance testing, and end-of-day standups.

## Day 1 and 2: Core Coding

On Monday and Tuesday, the team prioritizes implementation. Developers spend eight hours each day writing backend APIs and frontend components. Code reviews are conducted immediately after completion of modules during late afternoon sessions.

## Day 3 and 4: Integration and Testing

Wednesday and Thursday shift towards testing phases. Automated unit tests are run in parallel with integration testing. Quality Assurance engineers validate the entire workflow while developers debug critical issues reported by the QA team.

## Day 5: Final Polish and Meeting

Friday is dedicated to performance optimization and bug fixing. All team members participate in a retrospective meeting to discuss lessons learned and finalize tasks for next week.<|im_end|>
